message:
🐛 fix: NPS sessionCount NaN guard + stale fetchKeysStatus closure (#8263, #8259) (#8268)

- Guard parseInt result with Number.isFinite to prevent NaN from
  bypassing the MIN_SESSIONS_BEFORE_NPS threshold check
- Add fetchKeysStatus to handleSaveBaseURL useCallback deps to
  prevent stale closure after translation changes

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
